verbose.title: Verbose Logging
verbose.description: Enable additional logging to help diagnose issues.

items.title: Thermostat
items.description: Add one entry per Infinitude instance (physical HVAC system).

name.title: Name
name.description: Used as a prefix for zone accessory names, e.g. "Home Zone 1 Thermostat".

url.title: Infinitude URL
url.description: URL used by the plugin to talk to Infinitude. Use 127.0.0.1 if running on the same host.

externalUrl.title: External URL (optional)
externalUrl.description: LAN/browser-accessible URL for Open and Preview in the custom UI. Only needed if Infinitude URL uses 127.0.0.1 or localhost.

shutOffAway.title: Away on Off
shutOffAway.description: Set thermostat to Away activity when HomeKit sets the mode to Off.

holdUntil.title: Hold Until
holdUntil.description: Hold time for manual overrides (HH:MM). Omit to hold forever.

holdUntilNextActivity.title: Hold Until Next Scheduled Activity
holdUntilNextActivity.description: Automatically release the hold at the next scheduled program activity.

useFan.title: Expose Fan Accessory
useFan.description: Create a Fanv2 accessory showing blower state for each zone.

useActivitySwitches.title: Expose Activity Preset Switches
useActivitySwitches.description: Add switches to each thermostat for the Infinity activity presets: Home, Away, Sleep, Wake, and Manual.

useOutdoorTemperatureSensor.title: Expose Outdoor Temperature Sensor
useOutdoorTemperatureSensor.description: Create a temperature sensor accessory for the outdoor air temperature.

sensorpoll.title: Sensor Poll Interval (ms)
sensorpoll.description: How often to refresh the outdoor temperature sensor, in milliseconds.
